examples: Many early American woodsmen wore buckskin clothing.
On their wedding day, Pecos Bill dressed in his best buckskin suit.
Tomorrow take the white buckskin and go to the place where you watch the sun in the evening.
There were five horses in the rope corral, three bays, a sorrel, and a buckskin.
His wild west town had its origins in the Colorado ghost town of Buckskin Joe.
